### 🏢 The Agency Roster — 24 Specialized AI Agent Skills

**Stop hiring. Start deploying.**

Get a complete AI agency team of 24 specialized agents that work with **ANY AI tool** — Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, Copilot, Hermes, or any other AI.

No subscriptions. No API costs. No limits. One-time purchase, forever yours.

### 🔴 Engineering Division (8 agents)
- **Frontend Developer** — React, Vue, Angular, shadcn/ui, pixel-perfect
- **Backend Architect** — API design, databases, scalability, microservices
- **Mobile App Builder** — React Native, Flutter, Expo, iOS/Android
- **AI Engineer** — ML models, deployment, LLM integration, RAG
- **DevOps Automator** — CI/CD, Docker, Cloudflare, monitoring
- **Rapid Prototyper** — POCs, MVPs, hackathons, vibe coding
- **Senior Developer** — Laravel/Livewire, SOLID, DDD, refactoring
- **Security Engineer** — Pentesting, hardening, OWASP Top 10

### 🎨 Design Division (7 agents)
- **UI Designer** — Design systems, components, Figma→Code
- **UX Researcher** — User testing, analytics, personas
- **MUX Architect** — CSS systems, motion design, developer DX
- **Brand Guardian** — Brand identity, tone of voice, guidelines
- **Visual Storyteller** — Narratives, video, infographics, pitch decks
- **Whimsy Injector** — Micro-interactions, Easter eggs, delight
- **Image Prompt Engineer** — Midjourney, DALL-E, SD, Flux prompts

### 🟢 Business & Automation (9 agents)
- **Agent Architect** — Multi-agent architecture, orchestration
- **Business & Monetization** — Pricing, acquisition, market strategy
- **Content Creator** — TikTok, YouTube, faceless content
- **n8n Automator** — CRM, leads, SAV, workflows
- **WhatsApp Commerce** — WhatsApp Business, e-commerce
- **Vocal Specialist** — Voice agents, réceptionniste virtuelle
- **AI Models & Routing** — Local/cloud model optimization
- **NVIDIA SkillSpector** — Model benchmark, routing
- **Research & Watch** — Tech trends, arXiv, monitoring

### ✅ Works With Everything
| Tool | How to Use |
|------|-----------|
| **Claude Code** | Copy as `CLAUDE.md` |
| **Cursor** | Paste in `.cursorrules` |
| **ChatGPT** | Use as Custom Instructions |
| **Copilot** | Use as workspace instructions |
| **Hermes Agent** | Drop in `~/.hermes/skills/` |
| **Any AI Chat** | Paste the prompt directly |

### 📦 What's Included
- ✅ 24 complete SKILL.md files (YAML frontmatter + detailed markdown)
- ✅ Each agent: Role, When to Use, Key Skills, Workflow, Known Pitfalls
- ✅ MIT License — free to use, modify, and resell
- ✅ Lifetime updates via GitHub

### 🚀 Quick Start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/ziri22/agency-roster.git
cp -r agency-roster/skills/* ~/.hermes/skills/
```

Or just copy-paste any agent's content into your favorite AI tool.

**Created by Ziri Yahi** • [GitHub](https://github.com/ziri22/agency-roster)
